# Lighthouse Studios

> A media company in Southwest Florida, organized as three specialized brands: Lighthouse Marketing (LHM), Lighthouse Vows (LHV), and Lighthouse Real Estate (LHR).

## About

Lighthouse Studios is a Fort Myers-based media company. The company operates three specialized sub-brands, each focused on a specific audience and craft:

- **Lighthouse Marketing (LHM)** — AI-powered marketing, ads, and content for businesses
- **Lighthouse Vows (LHV)** — Wedding videography across Southwest Florida
- **Lighthouse Real Estate (LHR)** — Real estate media, drone, and videography

## Service Area

Primary service area: Southwest Florida — Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Naples, Bonita Springs, and Sarasota.

## Brands

### Lighthouse Marketing (LHM)
URL: https://lighthousestudiosfl.com/marketing/
Services: AI-powered ad management (Meta, Google, TikTok), video content production (presence + lead-gen), AI lead nurture, custom landing pages and funnels, web development, SEO, social media management.
Pricing:
- Starter: starting at $1,975/month + $985 setup (2 half-day shoots/mo)
- Growth: starting at $3,500/month + $1,625 setup (3 half-day shoots/mo)
- Scale: starting at $6,250/month + $3,150 setup (4-5 half-day shoots/mo, weekly)
- DIY Startup Playbook: $245 one-time
Approach page: https://lighthousestudiosfl.com/marketing/approach/
FAQs page: https://lighthousestudiosfl.com/marketing/faqs/
Full add-on list: https://lighthousestudiosfl.com/marketing/add-ons/
About page: https://lighthousestudiosfl.com/marketing/about/

### Lighthouse Vows (LHV)
URL: https://lighthousestudiosfl.com/vows/
Services: Cinematic wedding videography across Southwest Florida.
Portfolio: Instagram @lighthousevows

### Lighthouse Real Estate (LHR)
URL: https://lighthousestudiosfl.com/real-estate/
Services: Cinematic listing videos, drone footage, twilight shoots, agent branding content. Most listings delivered in 48 hours.
Order portal: https://portal.spiro.media/order/lighthouse/choose-your-package
